honesty.rule1: judge marks 'abstained' on parse-failure rather than fabricating a score
honesty.rule2: lean-check reports toolchain-unavailable when lean not on PATH
honesty.rule3: every candidate carries tokens-in, tokens-out, wall-ms, model version
honesty.rule4: picked-candidate heuristic penalises self-declared bluffs ('I cannot prove…')
honesty.rule5: quick-mode (K=1) does NOT exercise contradiction-probe — agreement reported as null
honesty.rule6: putnam-2025 is proof-style — no closed-form numeric answer is verifiable in pure Lean 4
